arts.ttl: Frank Lampard proffers perspective as Coventry City well beaten by leaders Leeds United
arts.sum: Asked if he felt the scoreline could have been different, the head coach admitted: “Yes and no, because our keeper made some good saves in the second half. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: What 'annoyed' Daniel Farke as Leeds United send title race message to Burnley and Sheffield United
arts.sum: Boss Daniel Farke was left with mixed emotions as Leeds United stretched their lead at the top of the Championship to five points after recording a 2-0 win at Coventry City this evening. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds streak further ahead at summit as Piroe and Bogle wrongfoot Coventry
arts.sum: First-half strikes from Joël Piroe and Jayden Bogle helped Leeds stretch their advantage at the top of Championship to five points with a comfortable 2-0 victory over Coventry. The visitors were a class above Frank Lampard’s side, who came into the game on the back of four successive league wins. Coventry could only blame themselves for being two goals down at the break. Piroe’s expertly taken finish made Ellis Simms pay for a mistake before Bogle was handed a gift by the goalkeeper Oliver Dovin. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard shows true colours with gesture to Leeds United fans after Coventry City defeat
arts.sum: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard decided to cup his ears to the Leeds United fans following his side's 2-0 defeat at the CBS Arena on Wednesday night . It's unknown why Lampard chose to make them gestures to the Leeds fans, especially after his Coventry side had lost 2-0.

arts.ttl: Leeds beat Lampard's Coventry to move five points clear at top
arts.sum: Leeds moved five points clear at the top of the Championship as they beat Coventry 2-0.
Highlights of the Sky Bet Championship clash between Coventry City and Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as Meslier and the defence stand out in Coventry win
arts.sum: Illan Meslier has had his critics this season but he pulled off a terrific stop to deny Coventry a goal when the ball looked destined to creep into the corner. Joel Piroe got the scoring underway after controlling Manor Solomon's through-ball well to fire into the corner.

arts.ttl: Leeds ease past Coventry to extend Championship advantage
arts.sum: Joel Piroe and Jayden Bogle both scored in the first half to see off Frank Lampard’s Sky Blues.

arts.ttl: Coventry City player ratings v Leeds United as Sky Blues come up short against the league leaders - Andy Turner
arts.sum: Leeds took the lead in the 17th minute when City lost possession in the middle of the park which allowed the visitors to break at speed with a through ball setting up Joel Piroe to get in behind and slot home with a hard and low finish into the far bottom corner. Ellis Simms was denied by a good save as City attempted to mount a sustained fight-back in the second half when Dovin also pulled off an impressive reaction stop to prevent United extending their lead.

arts.ttl: Is Coventry vs Leeds United on TV tonight? How to watch, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Leeds United will return to EFL Championship action tonight against Coventry City as they look to extend their lead at the top of the table. A victory against the Sky Blues would, also, see Leeds go five points clear of third-placed Sheffield United - who are just outside the top-two as it stands.
